name: Pork Satay Appetizers
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds boneless pork loin, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork into thin strips.
2. Stir together the minced garlic, soy sauce, Dijon-style mustard, and honey in a bowl.
3. Save half of the sauce for dipping.
4. Marinate the pork strips in the remaining sauce for 50 minutes.
5. Remove the pork strips from the marinade, discarding it.
6. Weave the pork strips onto bamboo skewers.
7. Grill or broil the skewers for 3-4 minutes.
8. Serve with the reserved dipping sauce.
Prep time: 20 minutes
Makes 16 servings.
